response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:12: The performers are dancing to 'Silhouette' by KANA-BOON. Identified through Japanese text on screen and audio. 2. 03:12-04:59: Performance changes to 'StarLight' by Oozora Subaru (written/composed by DIVELA). Identified through lyrics and performer. 3. Used search tool to retrieve official lyrics for both songs. 4. Validated and formatted lyrics in the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video shows a live performance by three VTubers (Oozora Subaru, Sakura Miko, and Ookami Mio). The performance includes two main vocal songs: 'Silhouette' (originally by KANA-BOON) followed by 'StarLight' (originally by Oozora Subaru).

scenes.description: The performers dance to the song 'Silhouette'. Japanese text on screen indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いっせーのーせで踏み込むゴーライン
僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ
一線越えて振り返るともうない
僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ

うだってうだってうだってく
煌めく汗がこぼれるのさ

覚えてないこともたくさんあっただろう
誰も彼もシルエット
大事にしてたもの、忘れたフリをしたんだよ
なにもないよ、笑えるさ

いっせーのーで、思い出す少年
僕らは何もかもを欲しがった
わかってるって、あぁ気づいてるって
時計の針は日々は止まらない

奪って奪って奪ってく
流れる時と記憶
遠く遠く 遠くになって

覚えてないこともたくさんあっただろう
誰も彼もシルエット
恐れてやまぬこと、知らないフリをしたんだよ
なにもないよ、笑えるさ

ひらりとひらりと舞ってる
木の葉の様に憂うことなく
焦燥もなく過ごしていたいよ

覚えてないこともたくさんあったけど
きっとずっと変わらないものがあることを
教えてくれたあなたは
消えぬ消えぬシルエット
大事にしたいもの持って大人になるんだ
どんな時も離さずに守り続けよう
そしたらいつの日にか
なにもかもを笑えるさ

ひらりとひらりと舞ってる
木の葉が飛んでゆく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
With a one, two, we step onto the goal line
We don't know anything, anything yet
Once we cross that line and look back, it's already gone
We don't know anything, anything yet

It's swirling, swirling, swirling around
The sparkling sweat is spilling over

I'm sure there were many things we've forgotten
Everyone, everything, the silhouettes
We pretended to forget the things we held dear, didn't we?
There's nothing left, we can laugh about it

With a one, two, I remember the young boy
We wanted everything, everything
I get it, ah, I've realized it
The hands of the clock, the days won't stop

Stealing, stealing, stealing away
The flowing time and memories
They become far, far, far away

I'm sure there were many things we've forgotten
Everyone, everything, the silhouettes
We pretended not to know the things we feared, didn't we?
There's nothing left, we can laugh about it

Like leaves dancing lightly, lightly
I want to spend my days without anxiety or impatience

I'm sure there were many things we've forgotten, but
Surely, the things that never change exist
You taught me that
The silhouette that never disappears, never disappears
Hold onto the things you want to cherish as you become an adult
Let's keep protecting them without ever letting go
And then, someday
We'll be able to laugh about everything

Leaves dancing lightly, lightly
Are flying away
